title: Rotate local administrator password with policy tooling
outcome: Local administrator credentials are rotated and recorded in approved vault.
facts: Password reuse across hosts increases blast radius

steps.text: Verify vault update and old credential invalidation
steps.completion: Old password fails and new password succeeds

title: Enable BitLocker on system drive
outcome: System drive encryption is enabled with recovery key escrowed.
facts: Recovery keys must be recoverable by support

steps.text: Confirm recovery key escrow and protection state
steps.completion: Drive reports protected and key is retrievable

title: Apply monthly cumulative update to server
outcome: Server is patched to approved cumulative update baseline.
facts: Patch level must match maintenance ring policy

steps.text: Validate OS build version and critical service health
steps.completion: Build and services match expected baseline

title: Configure Windows Defender AV real-time protection
outcome: Real-time malware protection is enabled and policy compliant.

title: Set Windows Firewall inbound baseline
outcome: Host firewall enforces approved inbound rule baseline.
facts: Allow rules should be explicit and minimal

steps.completion: Approved ports accessible; unauthorized ports blocked

title: Harden RDP settings for admin hosts
outcome: RDP access is constrained by policy and stronger auth controls.

steps.completion: Unauthorized attempts denied; authorized access succeeds

title: Enable PowerShell transcription and module logging
outcome: PowerShell activity is logged for audit and incident response.

steps.text: Enable transcription and module logging policies
Execute test script and verify log entries

title: Configure Event Forwarding to central collector
outcome: Security and operational events are forwarded to central SIEM path.
facts: Forwarded event channels must match use-case

steps.text: Define subscription for target event channels

title: Create scheduled backup for file share
outcome: File share backup runs on schedule and restore point is valid.
facts: Backup scope must include permissions metadata

steps.text: Configure backup job schedule and retention
Perform restore test of sample directory
steps.completion: Restored files and ACLs are correct

title: Reset failed Windows Update components
outcome: Windows Update service state is healthy and can process new updates.
facts: Corrupt cache can block update installation

steps.text: Restart services and run update scan

title: Join server to Active Directory domain
outcome: Server is domain-joined and receives baseline policies.
facts: Time sync and DNS are required for join success

steps.text: Join host to domain and reboot

title: Configure certificate auto-enrollment via GPO
outcome: Endpoints automatically enroll and renew required certificates.

title: Harden SMB protocol settings
outcome: SMB configuration aligns to modern secure protocol baseline.
facts: SMBv1 should be disabled unless exception approved

steps.text: Disable legacy SMB versions and unsafe options
Validate client connectivity for supported versions

title: Configure local audit policy baseline
outcome: Audit policy captures required security events for compliance.
facts: Overly broad auditing can increase log noise

steps.text: Generate test security event and verify capture

title: Enable Credential Guard on supported hosts
outcome: Credential Guard is active to protect LSASS secrets.

title: Rotate service account password safely
outcome: Service account secret rotated without breaking dependent services.
facts: Dependency inventory is required before cutover

steps.text: Update bound services/tasks to new credential

steps.completion: Services run successfully with new credential

title: Configure WinRM over HTTPS
outcome: Remote management channel is encrypted and policy-compliant.

steps.text: Restrict allowed auth mechanisms per policy

steps.completion: Remote command execution succeeds over HTTPS

title: Set controlled reboot policy for patch windows
outcome: Patch reboots occur inside approved maintenance windows only.
facts: Uncontrolled reboots can cause service outages

steps.text: Assign policy to target host group
Validate reboot behavior on test host
steps.completion: Reboot occurs only within configured window
